description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the code, setting up .NET Core 3.1.100 and Node.js 10.x, then generating a build number. It should publish documentation to GitHub Pages using a provided token, package a nightly NuGet package, and push it to NuGet using a secret API key.
